name: Dolores Hope
abstract: Dolores Hope, DC*SG (née DeFina; May 27, 1909 – September 19, 2011) was an American singer, entertainer, philanthropist, and wife of American actor and comedian Bob Hope.

concerts.label: The New York Pops 10th Birthday Gala Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Hal Espinosa
about_quotes.evidence: But they did say if you see any packages don’t open them. Well Dolores Hope gave everybody a Christmas gift and put packages in the rooms. So that was a funny thing. But that was before I got there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hal Espinosa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 20, 2024
